CustomField.formula: IF( RecordType.Name = 'SaaS', IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c, "Closed"), ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c, "Canceled") ), SaaS_Parents_Signing_Up_Stge_Met_Stamp__c, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(SaaS_Parents_Signing_Up_Stge_Met_Stamp__c)), SaaS_Parents_Signing_Up_Stge_Met_Stamp__c, DATEVALUE(Account__r.School_Object__r.SaaS_Parents_Signing_Up_Stage_Met_Date__c) ) ), NULL )
CustomField.label: SaaS Parents Signing Up Stage Met Date
